timeline.text: Settlement audit — stg_orders expected 120 cleared orders from the bank file; observed 0. Revenue is intact, but payout reconciliation is blocked.

timeline.cmd: SELECT COUNT(*) AS bank_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT settlement_ref) AS refs FROM bank_settlements WHERE settled_on = '2026-07-11';
timeline.note: did the bank file land cleanly?

timeline.cmd: SELECT COUNT(*) AS exact_matches FROM orders_raw o JOIN bank_settlements b ON o.settlement_ref = b.settlement_ref WHERE b.settled_on = '2026-07-11';
timeline.note: does the raw join identify the expected repair set?

timeline.cause: The bank file landed and all 120 references match orders_raw, but settlement_status was not promoted during staging. The repair set is bounded by the dated bank file; the row snapshot is staged before any update.
receipts: failed check: settled_count(120) on stg_orders — 0 settled rows
alternative untested: late reversal file changed three settlement outcomes

timeline.explain: Snapshot the exact 120-row repair set, update only those matched references, then rebuild staging and require the post-check to equal the snapshot count.
timeline.rollback: BEGIN IMMEDIATE; UPDATE orders_raw SET settlement_status = (SELECT r.settlement_status FROM orders_raw_restore_settlement_20260711 r WHERE r.source_rowid = orders_raw.rowid) WHERE rowid IN (SELECT source_rowid FROM orders_raw_restore_settlement_20260711); SELECT changes() AS restored_rows; COMMIT;
timeline.followup: Reconcile reversal files before promotion and make expected settlement count a pre-commit gate.

timeline.cmd: SELECT COUNT(*) AS observed, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders_raw_restore_settlement_20260711) AS expected FROM stg_orders WHERE settlement_status = 'settled';
timeline.out:
observed  expected
--------  --------
117       120
ERROR: post-check count mismatch; rollback required
timeline.note: does rebuilt staging match the snapshotted repair set?

timeline.text: Repair failed verification: 117 observed versus 120 expected. The staged rollback restored all 120 source rows; baseline checks and downstream checks match their pre-repair snapshots. Incident parked for a revised repair.

title: repair missed three rows — rollback restored the warehouse
